background.endsPattern: \[Browsersync\] Access URLs:|Found 0 errors\. Watching for file changes\.

tasks.label: stop astronaut-game dev
args: $targets = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -and (($_.CommandLine -like '*npm run dev*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*designer-save-server.cjs*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*lite-server --config bs-config.js --no-open*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*tsc --watch*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*concurrently*astronaut-game*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*concurrently*designer-save-server.cjs*')) }; $seen = New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[int]'; function Add-Descendants([int]$processId) { $children = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ParentProcessId = $processId"; foreach ($child in $children) { if ($seen.Add([int]$child.ProcessId)) { Add-Descendants([int]$child.ProcessId) } } }; foreach ($target in $targets) { $null = $seen.Add([int]$target.ProcessId); Add-Descendants([int]$target.ProcessId) }; foreach ($processId in ($seen | Sort-Object -Descending)) { try { Stop-Process -Id $processId -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }
